name: Lion Safari: Jigsaw Puzzles
description: Lion Safari: Jigsaw is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you can enjoy beautiful lion pictures and complete them piece by piece. Explore a collection of stunning safari scenes with majestic lions, lion cubs, and warm natural landscapes. Choose between 6, 12, and 24 pieces, unlock new images as you play, and enjoy smooth controls, helpful hints, and pleasant background music. It is a perfect casual game for players who love animals, relaxing gameplay, and classic jigsaw puzzles.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to select drag and place puzzle pieces
